name: assistant-ui
description: Provides a TypeScript and React component library for building AI chat and agent UIs — ChatGPT-style threads, generative UI, streaming, and tool-call rendering. YC-backed.

skills.name: Chat UI Components
skills.description: Ships React primitives for ChatGPT-style threads, composer, and message rendering out of the box.

skills.name: Generative UI
skills.description: Renders tool calls and structured model output as interactive React components in the conversation.

skills.name: Streaming Messages
skills.description: Streams assistant responses token by token with built-in state management and auto-scroll.
